title: Add the rest of the color filters
body:
**Description of Change**

Add a few more color filters from the C++ API to the C API.

**SkiaSharp Issue**

<!--
    Provide links to SkiaSharp issues here.
    Ensure that a GitHub issue was created for your feature or bug fix before sending PR.
-->

Related to https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/issues/1775

**API Changes**

```cpp
sk_colorfilter_t* sk_colorfilter_new_hsla_matrix(const float array[20]);
sk_colorfilter_t* sk_colorfilter_new_linear_to_srgb_gamma(void);
sk_colorfilter_t* sk_colorfilter_new_srgb_to_linear_gamma(void);
sk_colorfilter_t* sk_colorfilter_new_lerp(float t, sk_colorfilter_t* dst, sk_colorfilter_t* src);
```

**Behavioral Changes**

None.

<!--
    Describe any non-bug related behavioral changes that may change how users app behaves
    when upgrading to this version of the codebase.
-->

**Required SkiaSharp PR**

Requires https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2882

<!--
    Replace this with the full URL to the skia PR.
-->

**PR Checklist**

- [ ] Rebased on top of `skiasharp` at time of PR
- [ ] Changes adhere to coding standard
- [ ] Updated documentation
